description: loadFeatureFlags returns a frozen object so callers can't mutate the shared table; loadRuntimeMetrics and loadTracingTable return mutable per-call snapshots.

findings.rationale: loadFeatureFlags wraps the return value in Object.freeze; the other two loaders return mutable objects. The freeze is load-bearing: the feature-flag table is process-wide shared state and any consumer mutating it silently re-routes traffic for every other consumer. Unifying onto a shared loader that drops the freeze breaks the invariant.
